array.name: sg_02020405
array.item:
To use Osaifu-Keitai, IC card setting is required. Please confirm the Osaifu-Keitai Usage Regulations. (Press Back key to return to this screen.)
Agree to the [(link)], and run initial setup of IC card?
(The parental consent is necessary if you are minor.)

This application uses network connection.
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?

array.name: sg_02020406
array.item: Osaifu-Keitai Usage Regulations

array.name: sg_02020407
array.item: http://osaifu.nttdocomo.co.jp/other/terms.html

array.name: sg_02020408
array.item:
To use Osaifu-Keitai, UIM card setting is required. Please confirm the Osaifu-Keitai Usage Regulations. (Press Back key to return to this screen.)
Agree to the [(link)], and run initial setup of UIM card?
(The parental consent is necessary if you are minor.)

This application uses network connection.
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?

array.name: sg_02020409
array.item:
To use Osaifu-Keitai, IC card and UIM card setting is required. Please confirm the Osaifu-Keitai Usage Regulations. (Press Back key to return to this screen.)
Agree to the [(link)], and run initial setup of IC card and UIM card?
(The parental consent is necessary if you are minor.)

This application uses network connection.
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?
This application uses network connection.\n\nStart initial setup for using Osaifu-Keitai?

array.name: sg_02020410
array.item: http://osaifu.nttdocomo.co.jp/other/terms.html

array.name: sg_02020411
array.item: Agree to the Osaifu-Keitai\nUsage Regulations

array.item: /product/etc/felica/
